recommendations.title: Cold Skin
recommendations.overview: A young man who arrives at a remote island finds himself trapped in a battle for his life.

recommendations.title: Budapest
recommendations.overview: Two best friends stuck in boring jobs become bachelor party planners in Budapest.

recommendations.title: Frontier(s)
recommendations.overview: A gang of young thieves flee Paris during the violent aftermath of a political election, only to hole up at an Inn run by neo-Nazis.

recommendations.title: The Divide
recommendations.overview: Survivors of a nuclear attack are grouped together for days in the basement of their apartment building, where fear and dwindling supplies wear away at their dynamic.

recommendations.title: Hitman
recommendations.overview: A genetically engineered assassin with deadly aim, known only as "Agent 47" eliminates strategic targets for a top-secret organization. But when he's double-crossed, the hunter becomes the prey as 47 finds himself in a life-or-death game of internati

recommendations.title: The Crucifixion
recommendations.overview: When a priest is jailed for the murder of a nun on whom he was performing an exorcism, an investigative journalist strives to determine whether he in fact murdered a mentally ill person, or if he lost the battle with a demonic presence.

recommendations.title: Mayhem!
recommendations.overview: Sam is a professional boxer about to get released from prison. While on parole, his past catches up with him and he has no choice but to flee. Five years later, he has rebuilt a simple life on an exotic island in Thailand with his wife and her daught

recommendations.title: Megalodon
recommendations.genres: Action, Science Fiction, Horror, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A military vessel on the search for an unidentified submersible finds themselves face to face with a giant shark, forced to use only what they have on board to defend themselves from the monstrous beast.

recommendations.title: If Anything Happens I Love You
recommendations.overview: In this Oscar-winning short film, grieving parents journey through an emotional void as they mourn the loss of a child after a tragic school shooting.

recommendations.title: Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Dr. Victor Frankenstein, a brilliant but egotistical scientist, brings a creature to life in a monstrous experiment that ultimately leads to the undoing of both the creator and his tragic creation.
